buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80
badges.secondary: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80
badges.outline: text-foreground inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' theme strictly. Use black and white for 90% of the UI.
Use the 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento' grid layout defined in the guidelines.
Use 'recharts' for all charts and data visualization. Keep charts minimal (monochrome with 1 accent color).
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use 'framer-motion' for subtle entrance animations on dashboard cards.
Do not use gradients. Use solid colors and borders.
For the Login page, use a split layout: Left side form, Right side image (use the login_background URL).
Implement a 'Trends & Insights' page using a line chart to show task completion speed over time.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts, gradients).
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA/AAA).
